summary: Full E2E + backend pytest of Lezzet Dolu Sıfatlar MVP. All 11 backend tests pass; full student flow (Landing → Scene1 P1+P2 → Scene2 → Scene3 → Summary) completes with perfect 21/21 score; data persists in MongoDB; teacher dashboard renders stats, scene breakdown, sessions table and filter correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan handler for forward compatibility (non-blocking).

CORS allow_origins falls back to '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject credentialed requests in this combo. Currently no cookie auth is used so it's safe, but tighten origins for production.
teacher_stats: 'percents' list is computed but not actually a single source of truth aligned with avg_percent comment block; logic is correct but could be simplified.

Scene1Greeting phase 2 final score handler: when reaching last sentence, finalResults uses stale sentenceResults via spread — works because submitSentence appends synchronously, but using a derived value via setSentenceResults callback would be safer.
No data-testid on individual stat cards in TeacherDashboard (only refresh/back/filter/table). Optional improvement for testability.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Ogrenci sessions via pytest and a TEST E2E Ogrenci session via Playwright with full 21/21 score.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at /api on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is fully functional. Frontend E2E flow uses these data-testids: student-name-input, student-class-input, start-game-button, teacher-dashboard-link, adj-word-{şık|geniş|aydınlık|sıcak}, scene1-check-btn, scene1-continue-btn, s1-p2-word-{taze|sıcak|lezzetli|büyük|yeşil}, scene1-submit-sentence-btn, scene2-opt-{bu|şu|o|böyle|akşam|doyum|yemeğine}, scene2-next-btn, scene3-card-c1..c8, scene3-cat-{asil|sira|ulestirme|kesir}, game-summary, summary-home-btn, audio-play-button, sessions-filter, sessions-table, refresh-btn, back-home-link. Perfect run = 9 (Scene1) + 4 (Scene2) + 8 (Scene3) = 21.
